---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the BMW CarData Home Assistant integration
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

# ✨ Feature Request – BMW CarData Home Assistant Integration

Thanks for taking the time to suggest an improvement! 🙌

Feature requests help make this integration better for everyone. Please fill out the sections below with as much detail as possible.

---

## 💡 Feature Summary

**Briefly describe the feature or enhancement you’d like to see:**

---

## 🤔 Problem or Motivation

**What problem does this feature solve?**
Describe the current limitation or pain point.

---

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

**How would you like this to work?**
Describe the behavior, new sensors, services, attributes, or configuration options.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

---

## 🚗 Vehicle & Environment (if relevant)

Please provide details if this feature is vehicle- or setup-specific:

* **BMW vehicle model & year:**
  (e.g. BMW iX1 2024)

* **Home Assistant version:**
  (e.g. 2024.12.1)

* **BMW CarData HA integration version:**
  (e.g. v1.2.0)

---

## 📸 Mockups / Examples (optional)

Screenshots, diagrams, API responses, or examples from other integrations are very welcome.

---

## 🧠 Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or references that may help evaluate or implement this feature.

---

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

* [ ] I’ve searched existing issues and feature requests
* [ ] This feature fits within the scope of the BMW CarData integration
* [ ] I’ve provided enough detail to understand the request

---

❤️ Thanks for helping shape the future of the BMW CarData Home Assistant integration!
